title: Castopod
description: Open-source, self-hosted podcast hosting platform with built-in analytics and ActivityPub federation for the Fediverse (Podcasting 2.0).
installation: Castopod is a PHP/CodeIgniter app that needs a MySQL-compatible database (the MariaDB add-on here; Castopod does NOT support Postgres) and optionally Redis for caching, which is wired to the password-less Valkey add-on (CP_CACHE_HANDLER=redis + CP_REDIS_HOST). The public URL is injected via {{KUBERO_APP_URL}} into CP_BASEURL; this MUST match the real host or asset/feed URLs break. ROTATE before going live: CP_ANALYTICS_SALT (set to a fresh `openssl rand -hex 32` value — it salts analytics IP hashing and must not be the placeholder), and the MariaDB add-on credentials (db/user/password all default to 'castopod'). On first run, browse to the app URL to complete the web installer and create the super-admin (instance owner) account. Uploaded episode audio, cover art and the media library persist on the /app/public/media volume; raise its size for large podcast catalogs. Outbound email (SMTP) for notifications/invites must be configured in the admin panel after install. ActivityPub federation works out of the box once CP_BASEURL is reachable over HTTPS.
